base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of hammer_bro_walk — a character from 1985 super mario bros. koopa-kin with helmet. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 2-frame walk cycle — koopa-kin with helmet; walks tight platform back-and-forth
